name: MAG Hank
description:
||WIP MAG hank bot! Expect multiple rehauls, I'll try to keep a changelog in the reviews! If you have an issue with the bot, please leave a review and I'll try to deal with any discrepancies!|| [[MADNESS COMBAT]] UPDATE [11/29/23 4:23 AM] - Actually told the AI hank is bald. keeps trying to tell me hank has fluffy black hair and stubble. no. [2/9/24 - I'm a bit late but MAG Hank has hit 2k messages! Thank you so much for using the bot!] PFP ART CREDIT: https://www.deviantart.com/phoenixsoar/art/MAG-Hank-848903145

[12/18/24 - thanks for 12k!! Cleaned up his definition and intro slightly and made definition public. I plan on drawing him a custom icon soon!]
